title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Kaido, Oden, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Grao? What's up with your leg!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's my two bladed style!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Nyaah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Kya!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Master Kaido's speech has started!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Start the video Dender- Mush!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: As Kozuki Oden,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And since your ace's little brother,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought you would let me board your ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You!? Kozukii Open was a great guy everyone admired, right!? You can't be Kozukii Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Then you be him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you mean, I should be oden!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if I'm Oden, I'm not free!! Because of these Handcuffs!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wanted to go to the sea with ace and the others, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since I've been 8, I was forced to stay on this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Are these the handcuffs the prisoners wear!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Exactly!! If I were to leave the island, they would explode!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Honestly. I wonder if that's not a lie. What kind of parent would do that to their child?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it could very well be true, and it would blow my arms off.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because my father is that kind of guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Do you want me to remove them?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But how can I be sure that you will fight alongside us?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm warning you, with or without you, I'm going to beat Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to do it as much as you do.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you even know how many times he hit me since I was kid!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every time I opposed him, he answered me with punches!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I get it. I'm going to remove them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Remove them? But... it has been 20 years since my freedom has been stolen from me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It already has been two years since Whitebeard's Summit war!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Waah, the screen appeared!! That's the concert hall!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Things are finally starting to move across the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The government didn't lose its mind...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: When it abolished the Shichibuki system!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the proof that the Marine HQ is fully confident in their "new force" to fight against us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: CRR... CRR...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But let's not worry about the overconfident marines...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On our side of things, we allied ourselves with big mom's crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we will get the world's strongest weapons, the ancient weapons!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 39 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
